sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91013" key="prwto/news" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτό-νεως</orth>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ω</itype>, <sense id="n91013.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">going by ship for the first time</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
